nodes.name: PATCH Node.js – Save Phone
nodes.notes:
Calls PATCH /api/auth/profile/telegram on the Node.js gateway.
Set env variable NODEJS_URL = http://localhost:3001 (or ngrok URL for cloud n8n)

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
=✅ *P2P Insight – Registration Confirmed*

Your Telegram account has been linked to your P2P Insight profile.

You will receive automated procurement analysis reports here.

_This is an automated message._

nodes.name: Send Telegram Confirmation
nodes.notes: Uses the numeric telegramChatId (not phone number) as chat_id — this is now correct.

_workflow_notes.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram. Copy the token.
_workflow_notes.NODEJS_URL: Set to your Node.js public URL (ngrok or deployed). e.g. https://abc123.ngrok-free.app
